title: Software Review
description: Software review from G2, Capterra, Trustpilot, etc.

platform.description: The review platform where this review was published. Commonly found in: g2.com/products, capterra.com/software, trustpilot.com.

product_name.description: Name of the software product being reviewed.

product_slug.description: URL slug or identifier for the product on the review platform.

product_url.description: URL to the product listing on the review platform.

reviewer_name.description: Name or alias of the reviewer.

reviewer_company_size.description: Company size bracket of the reviewer's employer.

reviewer_verified.description: Whether the reviewer identity has been verified by the platform.

rating_overall.description: Overall rating given by the reviewer, out of 5.

review_title.description: Title or headline of the review.

review_body.description: Full text body of the review.

use_case.description: Described use case or problem the reviewer is solving.

helpful_count.description: Number of users who marked this review as helpful.

verified_purchase.description: Whether the reviewer is a verified purchaser of the product.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
